The store owner, Brad, made me feel welcome, and I had so much fun talking movies, metal, and Mooresville with him.

Brad is the craziest, coolest dude in Mooresville. I was at the shop for the RAVE (really awesome vendor event) yesterday, and it was in fact really awesome. There’s a ton of cool stuff in the shop, including a life size replica of the Simpson’s living room. The vibes were impeccable.

They have tons of collectibles and the nicest owner. They went out of their way to help find us KISS collectibles for us to decorate our restaurant with. I also appreciate the free arcade area he put a lot of work to open in the back of the store for the people of Mooresville to enjoy.

Fun place my son loved the toys and the decor…we bought some old school return of the jedi toys and a jaws poster….also got a few funny magnets for the fridge highly recommend!.. these places used to be everywhere when i was a kid , nowadays there are not nearly enough but this spot delivers…thanks to them

reviews_data.owner_answer: Very unexpected and this made our day. Thanks for taking to time to leave such an amazing review. Happy New Year and we hope to see you soon.
reviews_data.review_text: I’d describe Crazy Cool Collectibles as a “hidden gem.” This is an incredibly unique pop culture shop, oddities, replica props, original props, autographs, wrestling figures etc. I know that I even brought home a few goodies myself! Should you wander to the back of the store, you will discover an incredibly unique arcade that is overloaded with nostalgic goodness. However in my opinion, the main attraction are owners Brad and Shelby! I do a lot of traveling, picking and collecting, I have never encountered two individuals so down to earth, interactive and purely wholesome in all of my travels. I will be back to the Charlotte area soon, you better believe Crazy Cool Collectibles is my first stop. I encourage other curious folks to do the same, GO! Support a local business, converse with Brad and Shelby, your visit just might surprise you! They have SOMETHING for EVERYONE, trust me. This is a TRUE pop culture shop!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the kind words!! It was so great to meet you and can’t wait till you’re in the store again! ☺️
reviews_data.review_text: OH my word. I went to Crazy Cool Collectibles this afternoon for the first time to check out their comic collection and “Holy Toledo, Batman!” Did they deliver! The shop is so cool, diverse collections for all collectors and the girl Shelby even got down on the floor with me to look for my comics!!! Talk about owner dreamteam! These guys are so giving and kind and friendly, they made my holidays! You guys are truly missing out if you don’t take a peek in here!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you kind stranger for your excellent review, we hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Since my initial visit, I have consistently felt a sense of welcome in this store. It houses an impressive collection of collectibles and memorabilia, spanning a wide range of categories. While the personal collection is not for sale, it is truly remarkable to witness the priceless treasures that collectors have displayed. The staff, particularly Andy and Shelby, are always knowledgeable and friendly, creating a welcoming atmosphere. They make every transaction feel personal, and I look forward to visiting the store every week. It has become a sanctuary for collectors to exchange, sell, and swap stories about their beloved collectibles. Overall, it has been a consistently pleasurable experience. Additionally, they have video games!

reviews_data.review_text:
We took a drive from Davidson to the independent bookstore on Main St., and while we were there, someone recommended stopping by Crazy Cool Collectibles. So glad we did!

Brad, the owner is a fun guy, I love his sense of humor!

I did a video of him sharing a bit about how he supports FeedNC.

He’s also a great supporter of other local businesses. Ask him when you stop by. He’s got biz cards to share.

We also met the owners of C&C Cinematics. They are were there just chatting & hanging out while the author of The Secret Power of Kindness, Greg Atkinson was just chilling at Crazy Cool on a Sunday afternoon. Loved the vibes I got from the experience.

Check out this place!
I promise you will have a crazy cool experience.

Support local ❤️

Josephine Local Guide

reviews_data.review_text: Honestly wasn’t expecting much, just wanted to look around but I was impressed. Lots of cool stuff, but the back with the arcade brought me back to my childhood. Spent around 30 minutes playing on the Wii they had with all the games, which is free as long as you make a purchase. I don’t really like having collectibles and stuff so I offered to pay them $5 for letting me play their games which they generously refused and asked me to spread word about this place instead. Overall good experience, would recommend.

reviews_data.review_text: Loved this shop and the eclectic, fun items in store! The store owner, Brad, made me feel welcome, and I had so much fun talking movies, metal, and Mooresville with him.

Brad is the craziest, coolest dude in Mooresville. I was at the shop for the RAVE (really awesome vendor event) yesterday, and it was in fact really awesome. There’s a ton of cool stuff in the shop, including a life size replica of the Simpson’s living room. The vibes were impeccable.

They have tons of collectibles and the nicest owner. They went out of their way to help find us KISS collectibles for us to decorate our restaurant with. I also appreciate the free arcade area he put a lot of work to open in the back of the store for the people of Mooresville to enjoy.

Fun place my son loved the toys and the decor…we bought some old school return of the jedi toys and a jaws poster….also got a few funny magnets for the fridge highly recommend!.. these places used to be everywhere when i was a kid , nowadays there are not nearly enough but this spot delivers…thanks to them

reviews_data.owner_answer: Very unexpected and this made our day. Thanks for taking to time to leave such an amazing review. Happy New Year and we hope to see you soon.
reviews_data.review_text: I’d describe Crazy Cool Collectibles as a “hidden gem.” This is an incredibly unique pop culture shop, oddities, replica props, original props, autographs, wrestling figures etc. I know that I even brought home a few goodies myself! Should you wander to the back of the store, you will discover an incredibly unique arcade that is overloaded with nostalgic goodness. However in my opinion, the main attraction are owners Brad and Shelby! I do a lot of traveling, picking and collecting, I have never encountered two individuals so down to earth, interactive and purely wholesome in all of my travels. I will be back to the Charlotte area soon, you better believe Crazy Cool Collectibles is my first stop. I encourage other curious folks to do the same, GO! Support a local business, converse with Brad and Shelby, your visit just might surprise you! They have SOMETHING for EVERYONE, trust me. This is a TRUE pop culture shop!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the kind words!! It was so great to meet you and can’t wait till you’re in the store again! ☺️
reviews_data.review_text: OH my word. I went to Crazy Cool Collectibles this afternoon for the first time to check out their comic collection and “Holy Toledo, Batman!” Did they deliver! The shop is so cool, diverse collections for all collectors and the girl Shelby even got down on the floor with me to look for my comics!!! Talk about owner dreamteam! These guys are so giving and kind and friendly, they made my holidays! You guys are truly missing out if you don’t take a peek in here!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you kind stranger for your excellent review, we hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Since my initial visit, I have consistently felt a sense of welcome in this store. It houses an impressive collection of collectibles and memorabilia, spanning a wide range of categories. While the personal collection is not for sale, it is truly remarkable to witness the priceless treasures that collectors have displayed. The staff, particularly Andy and Shelby, are always knowledgeable and friendly, creating a welcoming atmosphere. They make every transaction feel personal, and I look forward to visiting the store every week. It has become a sanctuary for collectors to exchange, sell, and swap stories about their beloved collectibles. Overall, it has been a consistently pleasurable experience. Additionally, they have video games!

reviews_data.review_text:
We took a drive from Davidson to the independent bookstore on Main St., and while we were there, someone recommended stopping by Crazy Cool Collectibles. So glad we did!

Brad, the owner is a fun guy, I love his sense of humor!

I did a video of him sharing a bit about how he supports FeedNC.

He’s also a great supporter of other local businesses. Ask him when you stop by. He’s got biz cards to share.

We also met the owners of C&C Cinematics. They are were there just chatting & hanging out while the author of The Secret Power of Kindness, Greg Atkinson was just chilling at Crazy Cool on a Sunday afternoon. Loved the vibes I got from the experience.

Check out this place!
I promise you will have a crazy cool experience.

Support local ❤️

Josephine Local Guide

I don’t really like having collectibles and stuff so I offered to pay them $5 for letting me play their games which they generously refused and asked me to spread word about this place instead. Overall good experience, would recommend.
